zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme於大約1350年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親Henry Tailboys17歲，母親Eleanor Burradon19歲。他於1386年與Margaret Deincourt在英國諾圖波藍德賀普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1417年9月20日在英國林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme于大约1350年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Henry Tailboys17岁，母亲Eleanor Burradon19岁。他于1386年与Margaret Deincourt在英国諾圖波藍德賀普爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1417年9月20日在英国林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

nameMeanings.name: Tailboys,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Talboys
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Taillebois (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme was born about 1350, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, Henry Tailboys, was 17 and his mother, Eleanor Burradon, was 19. He married Margaret Deincourt in 1386, in Hepple, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 September 1417, in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme est né environ 1350, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Tailboys, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Burradon, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Deincourt en 1386, à Hepple, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1417, à Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.North Kyme, North Kesteven District, Lin: North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme um 1350 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Tailboys 17 und seine Mutter Eleanor Burradon 19. Er hat 1386 in Hepple, Northumberland, England Margaret Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. September 1417 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme è nato il circa 1350 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Tailboys, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Burradon, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Deincourt nel 1386, nel Hepple, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1417, nel Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kymeが約1350年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry Tailboysは17歳，母Eleanor Burradonは19歳であった。1386年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヘップルでMargaret Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1417年9月20日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタリングボロウで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース クイメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Tailboys(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Burradon(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1386년 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤프플에서 Margaret Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 9월 20일 영국 링코실르 스탤링버루에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Tailboys, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Burradon, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Deincourt em 1386, em Hepple, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1417, em Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme родился около 1350 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Tailboys было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Burradon, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Deincourt в 1386 г. в местности хеппл, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 сентября 1417 г. в местности сталлингбороую, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности норт ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Tailboys, 5th Lord of Kyme nació aproximadamente 1350, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Tailboys, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Eleanor Burradon, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Margaret Deincourt en 1386, en Hepple, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1417, en Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
